text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem opioidcds-overrideReasons

This case-sensitive code system http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/CodeSystem/opioidcds-overrideReasons defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
snooze-1-month Snooze Alert for 1 MonthDisable the alert for 1 month for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
snooze-3-months Snooze Alert for 3 MonthsDisable the alert for 3 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
snooze-6-months Snooze Alert for 6 MonthsDisable the alert for 6 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
snooze-1-year Snooze Alert for 1 YearDisable the alert for 1 year for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization
snooze-1-month-with-comment Snooze Alert for 1 Month with a CommentDisable the alert for 1 month for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
snooze-3-months-with-comment Snooze Alert for 3 Months with a CommentDisable the alert for 3 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
snooze-6-months-with-comment Snooze Alert for 6 Months with a CommentDisable the alert for 6 months for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
snooze-1-year-with-comment Snooze Alert for 1 Year with a CommentDisable the alert for 1 year for a particular patient, user(s), department(s), site(s), or organization. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment
comment CommentA comment about the received information or suggestion. This can include feedback for improvement/refinement.
update-order Update OrderThe order will be updated to the order(s) suggested by the service
cancel-order Cancel OrderThe order will be canceled based on the information provided by the service
launch-app Launch AppAn application will be used to complete the workflow
accept-suggestion Accept SuggestionThe suggestion provided by the service has been accepted
accept-suggestion-with-comment Accept Suggestion with CommentThe suggestion provided by the service has been accepted. Additional action(s) documented in an associated comment
decline-suggestion Decline SuggestionThe suggestion provided by the service has been declined
decline-suggestion-with-comment Decline Suggestion with CommentThe suggestion provided by the service has been declined. Reasoning and/or justification supplied in an additional comment

name: CDC_Opioid_Override_Reasons
title: CDC Opioid Override Reasons
description: Override reasons for the 2022 CDC Clinical Practice Guideline for Prescribing Opioids for Pain
copyright: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
